Release notes for PebbleOS v1.11 detailing new features, improvements, and bug fixes.

# Purpose
This document announces the release of PebbleOS version 1.11 for the Pebble SmartWatch. It details new features and improvements, such as an enhanced notification user interface that allows viewing multiple notifications and an updated Set Time UI. The document also introduces new functionalities, including the option to display current speed in the RunKeeper application and changes to the music application's track buttons. Additionally, it lists the addition of the Simplicity watchface and the removal of the Fuzzy Time watchface, which remains accessible through the watchapp library. The document concludes with a section on bug fixes, addressing issues like excessive power consumption by the Bluetooth module, text rendering performance, and various UI-related crashes and bugs.
